reset_description: Resets the tutorial and shows it again the next time you open the dashboard.

welcome.title: Welcome to myBaby
welcome.description: Let us show you the key features — in under two minutes.

fab.title: Quick capture
fab.description: Tap the floating plus button to quickly capture a new entry (sleep, feeding, diaper ...).

create_entry.title: Capture an entry
create_entry.description: Fill in the form and save. You will land on the plugin page with your new entry on top.

switch_tab.title: Switch range
switch_tab.description: On the dashboard you can switch between Today / 7 / 14 / 30 days to spot trends.

plugin_admin.title: Manage plugins
plugin_admin.description: Under Settings you can enable or disable optional plugins — like tummy time, growth curves or well-child visits.

done.title: Done!
done.description: That's it. You can replay the tutorial anytime via Profile > Restart tutorial.
